title.zh: 冷鏈物流智能秤管理項目
title.en: Cold Chain Smart Scale Management Project

system_used.zh: 智能倉儲稱重管理系統

background.zh: 該冷鏈物流中心每日處理大量冷凍食品，低溫高濕使傳統設備故障率高，因此改以防水智能秤與數據化稱重流程取代舊作業模式。
background.en: This cold-chain logistics center handles large volumes of frozen goods daily. Because low temperatures and humidity caused frequent failure in traditional equipment, it switched to waterproof smart scales and a data-driven weighing workflow.

pain_points.zh: 低溫高濕環境下，舊設備穩定性差
pain_points.en: Legacy equipment lacked stability in cold and humid environments

pain_points.zh: 戴手套操作與人工記錄效率低
pain_points.en: Glove use and manual recording reduced efficiency

pain_points.zh: 紙本記錄在冷庫環境易受潮
pain_points.en: Paper records were damaged easily in cold storage

pain_points.zh: 出入庫資料無法即時核對
pain_points.en: Inbound and outbound records could not be verified in real time

system.zh: 智能倉儲稱重管理系統

details.zh: 部署 3 台 XZ-5000 防水智能秤
系統對接 WMS 倉儲管理

result_detail.zh: 導入防水智能秤後，人工成本降低 50%，出入庫效率提升 35%，冷鏈作業數據準確率顯著提升，且可即時查詢。
result_detail.en: After deploying waterproof smart scales, labor costs dropped by 50%, inbound and outbound efficiency rose by 35%, and cold-chain operational data became significantly more accurate and instantly accessible.
